DBGT.com Version 2.0

  Host Site
01'11'04 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey people, I should be adding some more music videos this week. I have also opened up a free hosting service, for new web masters and small colaborations. It's still in its early stages, but is up and running. It's prety simple and sraight forward to use. please take a look.

* Revhost

Some New Music Videos
01'07'04 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey, I've added some more music videos to the media gallery. Please check it out, there are some pretty good ones there. I will add a few more music videos in about a week or so. I hope you enjoy watching these.

*NEW MUSIC VIDEOS

Happy New Year!!!
01'01'04 ++ posted by MajinGohan
Hey everyone, say goodbye to 2003 and hello to 2004. Personally I had a really good 2003, lots of experiences, and lotz of funnn... and i really changed as a person. I just hope 2004 can be just as good. Anywayz, from all of us here at DBGT.COM, we wish you all a Happy New Year, and a thrilling upcoming year! /// MG Out...

Merry Christmas!!!
12'25'03 ++ posted by MajinGohan
Hey everyone, I'm just posting this to wish everyone a very Merry Christmas for those who celebrate it. Hope ya'll got lots of presents, and hope you also remembered to give lots of presents, lol. Anywayz, I'm enjoying my holidayz, keeping busy as usual, but also getting more relaxing time than with school. Anywayz thats it for now, Merry Christmas to everyone from here at DBGT /// MG Out...

Some New Music Videos
12'22'03 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey, sorry I havnt't posted in a while, its a really busy time of year for me as I have exams in January. I have just added two new music videos, which are availble for download in the multimedia gallery. I will try to get a few more up before christmas day. Incase I don't post again before then; Have a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

*NEW MUSIC VIDEOS

Happy Holidays!!!
12'20'03 ++ posted by MajinGohan
Hey everyone, school just ended for me yesterday, and now I have 2 weeks of winter fun up here in Canada. I also just wanted to wish all of our viewers Happy Holidays and a Merry Christmas, hope ya'll get lots and lots of presents under the tree. And also if you don't celebrate Christmas, just have some Happy Holidays. So from everyone here at DBGT, we wish you safe and fun holidays! /// MG Out...

"Saddam Captured"
12'15'03 ++ posted by MajinGohan
Hey everyone, as most of you have no doubt heard by now. The allied forces in Iraq just captured the Iraqi dicator, Saddam Hussein this past weekend. They found him in a 2metre hole in a farmhouse about 15 miles away from the city of Tikrit (Saddam's hometown). They had 600 soldiers on the mission, cutting off the area when they found him. He had grown a beard and looked very different. But after being shaved and getting a haircut, it was confirmed that it was Saddam Hussein and not an imposter.

I don't really know what to make of this, I guess its a good thing that they finally got him... but I doubt the iraqi rebels are going to back down in their attacks. Still a long road ahead in my opinion... /// MG Out...

Meh...
12'12'03 ++ posted by MajinGohan
Hey everyone, been a while since you've heard from meh. As you can no doubt see, DBGT is going extremely slow, but I would like to thank Draton and JamJar for doing whatever they could. Especially JamJar for keeping that gallery going. And thx to all you fans who continue to visit us. I've just been really busy with school lately, schools being a bitch and alwayz will be. I really can't say what I'm planning right now for DBGT, but I'll be sure to figure out something. Anywayz, just enjoy what we have for now, and I'll see if I can get even something new up. Thx /// MG Out...

Fan Art Section Added
12'07'03 ++ posted by JamJar
You will be happy to know that the gallery is now up ad running properly. I apologize for the bad uptime over the last couple of days; our web servers was suffering from multiple Dos attacks. I have added a fan-art section to the gallery, allowing registered users to upload their fan-art and recieve comments and votes from other users. Its very simple to use, just don't upload any rude or offensive material please.

*FAN ART SECTION

Awesome New Site Open!
11'30'03 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone, I wanted to post here because my good friend Shan has opened a brand spankin' new website called NarutoSource.com. I'd like to give him a huge shoutout! Give them a visit, they're a dedicated website with great content!

Check it out! NarutoSource.com!

The Gallery Status
11'26'03 ++ posted by JamJar
The gallery has now been offline for a few days now because we were loading some new software onto the server. This is now complete and the gallery should once again be fully functional. Thanks to the people who have come to me with music videos, most of them have been really great, and they will shortly be put up on the gallery. The offer is still open to anyone who want's their music videos displayed on the gallery, just contact me over msn(preferably) or aim and we can discuss it.

*MULTIMEDIA GALLERY

A Few Things
11'24'03 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone, it's been a while since you've heard from me. First things first, if you've sent me an email in the last month, I haven't gotten it at all. I realized that the mail server isn't correct, and that I'm going to have to re-configure it. So, if you have any feedback, I'll re-post my email address once I make a new one for you to reply onto. Next, it seems as if JamJar is the only one running this site. I don't know where MG has been, but I've been busy with other projects on the web and I haven't come to help out much. I apologise. Okay, finally. MG told me about a week ago (which was the last time I spoke to him) that he wanted the anime news back up. Now I personally don't really have a problem with this, but I think that this time we need some REAL good news posters. This section is constantly going up and down, and so therefore we need to get it back at a constant pace. So, if you think you can REALLY post a good amount of news each week, you're going to have to contact me for a position. In this case, you'll need to IM me on AIM, my sn being DratonXL, since my email is down. That's all from me at the moment. Also, I've taken my name off the contact page for now, because I'm 'temporarily inactive' on the site. Besides that, go ahead and contact me if you're going to apply for the anime news position. Lastly, I think JamJar needs a pat on the back for holding this site up, and keeping it going. Okay, this ends my post. Draton, signing out...

Video Clips Added
11'12'03 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey, the gallery is now properly working as our host is finally stable. I have just uploaded some more video clips to the gallery, I hope you like them. I will try to get another load up before the end of the week. The offer for music video's is still open, if you are an author of them and would like them to be displayed on dbgt.com please e-mail me.

Gallery - Up and Down
10'29'03 ++ posted by JamJar
The gallery has been up and down over the last few days because our web host is changing Internet Service Providers (ISP's). The gallery should be fully stable buy Thursday this week (30/10/03). Sorry about this, but it is not something we can control. :)

Dbgt Has Been Ripped
10'25'03 ++ posted by JamJar
Dbgt has been ripped by a website called dbgtc, The owner must have been extremely stupid to think he could get away with this, they didn't even try to cover it up. I have e-mailed the owner but still no response.

Website Link

Screenshot 02

New FanArt Pieces Added
10'24'03 ++ posted by MajinGohan
Hey everyone, just a quick update. I've added about 6 new pieces of FanArt. And also created a new category in the FanArt section called Originals. This is where fanart will be displayed or original characters drawn through the artists mind, one that doesn't actually exist. So far we have one in that category. Thats it for now, check out the fanart /// MG out...

*Originals FanArt
*All Other FanArt

Media Gallery Update
10'14'03 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey, I have now found a good-quality web host for the multimedia gallery. Hopefully we will no longer have poor uptime and fluctuating loading times. The gallery has been restored to the state it was before it last went down, including the other images section which I have added today. As well as doing small things around the website, I would like to expand the music videos section. If you are interested in having your music videos displayed on dbgt.com, and getting a bit of publicity for yourself ; please e-mail me with your aim or msn so we are able to discuss this.

*MULTIMEDIA GALLERY

NEWS: An anime channel available in the uk called cnx (ntl:903 / sky:621), is now permiering the ‘Dragonball’ Series in english. It’s on at 17:00 and 20:30 every week day.

Hey hey! We're Back!
10'11'03 ++ posted by MajinGohan
Hey everyone, been a while hasn't it? Well DBGT is back up for the most part. And I'll take this moment to explain the jist of why we were down. Basically we needed to do a server switch, but the company changed our DNS too fast before we could get a server setup and all. And then for a while I had trouble logging in, so to make a long story short, things messed up, but we were able to fix them. And now I've uploaded DBGT and everything seems to be in working order except for a couple things which should be fixed quite quickly. Until then, please enjoy what we currently have on the site. And to staff, please contact me on AIM. Thanks again... DBGT is back. /// MG Out...

News back up and running...
10'11'03 ++ posted by Draton
Well, it's good news that our server is back up. Anyway, MG asked me to install the news today morning, so here it is. Staff, I'm going to need you re-send either MG your info, or me your info for posting. I'll give you the details later on. Okay, so fans, enjoy the site as of late. We worked hard on getting it back up on this new host and we hope you appreciate the new work. Have fun and happy browsing ^^. Draton, signing out..

Website Bio:
Layout Revision: 04/18/03
Site Creation: -'97
Webmaster: Majin Gohan
Founded By: Ruben Rodas
Site Layout Copyright: Pgd
Live Stats: 8 users online

Site News: The Site is moving along and growing gradually, it may be slow, but we are moving at a good steady pace so this site can regain the calibur it once had. We currently have an excellent staff who is bringing you lots of original information and interaction on the site. We're also constantly working on having media up, and having it stay up for as long as possible / Keep Visitng /

Majin Gohan is getting busier by the day with life among other things. But still has love for the site and Dragon Ball in general. He tries his hardest to keep the site organized and going.

Donate: Running the site is getting harder and harder because of the server costs, which are well over $100. Since we need a really good server to suit DBGT's needs and to give a pleasant time for you the fans, it could be made easier however through donations. So if you got a couple extra bucks lying around or just want to help us out, please donate to the site using the paypal button below / Thank You All! /
Support Us:
